command: Find the likely implementation area first. Do not edit anything yet.
Before editing, explain which layer should own this fix, what invariants must remain true, and what the main regression risks are.
Make the minimal patch now in the correct ownership layer. Use yoyo change for the edit if available. Do at most 2 confirming reads before the first edit. Avoid broad refactors.
Run the most relevant verification command, then summarize the final diff scope.
